route_project_duplicate_status.interpretation: Route/project duplicate-shaped issues have been fixed when deterministic evidence supports a merge alias or a do-not-merge guard. The current route/project validator-style duplicate backlog is closed; remaining route/project work is quality/aggregate-policy scouting rather than an open duplicate count.

implemented_slice.method: Added exact metric_name rules for finite no-unit rows audited as object/count, population, or ridership units. No broad suffix or regex rule was added.

linnaeus.status: completed; safe rate/percent candidates deferred to a separate slice

guardrails: Inference remains inert when payload.unit or payload.unit_normalized already exists.
Inference requires finite numeric payload.value for these count, population, and ridership rows.
Deferred traffic, score/rating, rate, broad ridership, change-count, and no-value/compound rows.

materialization.result: Materialized 93067/98115 submissions; retired submissions skipped: 265; SQLite FTS quick_check: ok

validation.result: Issues: 0; submissions: 98115; canonical records: 84027; wiki pages: 7331

next_lanes: Implement a separate guarded rate/percent slice from Linnaeus, keeping Secondary Screening Score/Bell-Curve policy rows deferred unless explicitly accepted.
Audit remaining exact singleton count rows such as audible pedestrian warning systems, audit contracts, Open Data attendees, and users/customers counts.
Re-run route/project identity checks only if candidate edges or validation issues reappear after future materialization.
